title: Player lamp priority and build placement UI chain
summary: Connect the player-facing HUD/action bar to the authoritative lamp/build vertical slice with selection, placement, command, job feedback and failure reasons.
acceptance: Player can select a lamp/build target or build mode, issue a real command through the HUD/action bar, and see authoritative command acceptance or structured rejection
Lamp chain visibly proceeds through job marker, pawn claim, pawn movement, work/progress, completion and alert/resource/status update or blocked reason
Build chain minimally supports selecting build mode, tile hover valid/invalid feedback, blueprint placement, job marker, pawn claim, construction progress and structure completion or blocked reason
Command surfaces are localized in zh-CN and en and never claim unsupported commands as available
Save/load behavior for in-progress or completed command state is explicitly handled or blocked with reviewed reasons
requiredChecks: corepack pnpm exec vitest run --exclude=**/*.e2e.test.ts packages/ui-react/src/shell-hud.test.ts

history.details: Public browser Worker/session bridge decision required: apps/web can send WM-0150 command payloads via @wuming-town/sim-protocol, but it has no reviewed public path to instantiate or talk to the authoritative Simulation Worker. apps/web package boundaries do not allow @wuming-town/sim-worker, and packages/sim-worker/src/browser-worker-entry.ts is internal-only. See coordination/reports/WM-0152.md for options and recommendation.
WM-0157 is done and pushed at 7a24e1e; @wuming-town/sim-worker now exposes the reviewed package-root browser Worker session API for WM-0152 to consume without deep imports or UI authority.

Public authoritative playable projection is still missing after WM-0157. Web can now send WM-0150 commands through @wuming-town/sim-worker, but the reviewed Worker protocol/session surface still exposes only RenderSnapshot/UiDelta hashes and compact summaries, not the full playable read-model needed for HUD, placement, job markers, pawn motion/progress, and blocked reasons. WM-0152 cannot truthfully replace WM-0151 playback until that projection surface exists. See coordination/reports/WM-0152.md for options and recommendation.

forbiddenPaths: fake shell-local gameplay claimed as authoritative
